South Sudan Collective Outcomes Dashboard

Reporting period: Q3 2025

Dashboard Filters

Filters are synchronized. Use the dropdown checkboxes to select one or multiple options. Choices, indicators and visuals update dynamically based on available results.

People Reached by Output / Result Area
Each square represents approximately 1% of the total reported reach under the current filter selection.

Collective Outcome / Result Area Analysis

Output-level achievement, indicator ranking, and target-progress where data allows.

Agency Contributions

Agency contribution by people reached, outputs, categories and geography. Agency contribution by people reached, outputs, categories and geography.

Donor Contributions

Funding visibility and donor advocacy module.

Donor contribution view can be activated once donor-specific fields are added.
Required fields: Donor Name, Donor Logo, Amount Contributed, Funding Status, Agency Funded, Output/Category, State/County and Funding Period. The module is structured to show donor recognition cards, donor-to-agency-to-output flows, funding gaps and geographic funding coverage.

Recommended donor visuals

VisualPurpose
Donor logo cardsRecognise funding partners and show headline contribution.
Donor → Agency → Output SankeyShow how funding translates into collective outcome results.
Funding gap barsHighlight unmet needs by output and geography.
Map overlayShow funded coverage by state/county.

Spatial Distribution of Collective Outcomes Activities across South Sudan

Bubble size and geographic intensity reflect people reached. Tooltips show state, county, agency, output/category, indicator and population disaggregation.
